description: Create a new Grafana dashboard (MED-02 read-only-safe-origin gate fixture: a HYPOTHETICAL write op under grafana.com, the origin classified SAFE only because the vendored slice is read-only -- list_dashboards/get_dashboard/query_metrics).
_fixture: MED-02 (38-REVIEW): a hypothetical grafana WRITE descriptor. grafana.com is classified SAFE (absent from service-denylist.json sensitiveOrigins) ONLY because the vendored grafana slice exposes read ops alone (list_dashboards/get_dashboard/query_metrics). checkReadOnlySafeOrigins() in verify-catalog-crosscheck.mjs MUST flag this descriptor (service grafana.com + sideEffectClass write) so a future re-vendor that adds a grafana write FAILS the build (forcing a re-classification to sensitive) rather than shipping it writable-under-Auto. _fixtures/ is excluded by readJsonDir non-recursion so it never ships and never reaches the CLI corpus sweep. (Re-pointed from reddit.com/submit_post in 39.5-04: the real reddit plugin gained write ops and was reclassified sensitive, so reddit is no longer a read-only-safe origin -- grafana is the still-read-only-safe stand-in that keeps this 'a write on a safe origin fails the build' proof valid.)
